Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Guido van Rossum Interviews Thomas Wouters (Python Core Dev) 54 upvotes, 3 comments
  2. First in-utero stem cell therapy for fetal spina bifida repair is safe: study 311 upvotes, 58 comments
  3. Physicists developing a quantum computer that’s entirely open source 126 upvotes, 24 comments
  4. DOS Memory Management 56 upvotes, 8 comments
  5. Show HN: I built a sub-500ms latency voice agent from scratch 438 upvotes, 126 comments
  6. Inside the M4 Apple Neural Engine, Part 1: Reverse Engineering 348 upvotes, 100 comments
  7. The Cathode Ray Tube site 54 upvotes, 10 comments
  8. Simple screw counter 153 upvotes, 40 comments
  9. Motorola announces a partnership with GrapheneOS 2214 upvotes, 809 comments
  10. Seed of Might Color Correction Process (2023) [pdf] 91 upvotes, 23 comments
  11. I built a pint-sized Macintosh 42 upvotes, 10 comments
  12. C64: Putting Sprite Multiplexing to Work 8 upvotes, 0 comments
  13. Launch HN: OctaPulse (YC W26) – Robotics and computer vision for fish farming 101 upvotes, 34 comments
  14. Show HN: Govbase – Follow a bill from source text to news bias to social posts 196 upvotes, 77 comments
  15. British Columbia is permanently adopting daylight time 859 upvotes, 422 comments
  16. Privacy-preserving age and identity verification via anonymous credentials 20 upvotes, 4 comments
  17. We Built a Video Rendering Engine by Lying to the Browser About What Time It Is 55 upvotes, 19 comments
  18. AWS outage due to drone attacks in UAE 19 upvotes, 4 comments
  19. Arm's Cortex X925: Reaching Desktop Performance 105 upvotes, 44 comments
  20. Meta’s AI smart glasses and data privacy concerns 1134 upvotes, 654 comments
  21. Ars Technica fires reporter after AI controversy involving fabricated quotes 322 upvotes, 191 comments
  22. Buckle Up for Bumpier Skies 43 upvotes, 19 comments
  23. Programmable Cryptography (2024) 74 upvotes, 41 comments
  24. Against Query Based Compilers 69 upvotes, 38 comments
  25. The beauty and terror of modding Windows 8 upvotes, 2 comments
  26. Elevated Errors in Claude.ai 160 upvotes, 136 comments
  27. Guilty Displeasures 82 upvotes, 81 comments
  28. Ask HN: Who is hiring? (March 2026) 219 upvotes, 263 comments
  29. iPhone 17e 292 upvotes, 420 comments
  30. New iPad Air, powered by M4 407 upvotes, 631 comments

Last generated 7:30pm, 3 March 2026. Source here.
